description: Add uv project setup and fix NumPy 2.0 compatibility
Add trend decomposition: DLinearForecast separates trend, encoder handles residual
Test non-strict causal mask: allow same-time-patch cross-variate attention
Head specialization: per-head log-spaced attention windows (venv not activated)
Head specialization: per-head log-spaced attention windows [1..20] for lag diversity
Increase d_model 32→128 for richer feature extraction; restore venv activation
Normalize Q/K patches before attention: shape-correlation
Add second stack: n_stacks=2 (only 1 epoch, too slow)
stride 6->16: reduce tokens for more epochs
train_epochs 3->7: fill 600s budget (MSE best at epoch 6)
train_epochs 7->10: no improvement (same early-stop at epoch 7)
Stage3 TCN dilations (1,2,4): wider receptive field before patch extraction
Reduce e_layers 3→2: fewer attention layers for faster epochs and more training rounds
Try e_layers=1: single attention layer for even faster epochs (~15+ in 600s)
Add learnable relative position bias in SignedAttention (10 params per layer)
